subcodes.first_line: In this day the Speaker of Sinai is seated upon the Throne of Manifestation, and the blessed Tree uttereth forth the Most Exalted Word. The signs and tokens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز مکلم طور بر عرش ظهور مستوی و شجر مذکور بکلمه مبارکه علیا ناطق علامات و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @living waters; water of life
